slides.title: The stairs are a *free daily gym*.
slides.sub: Climbing trains your legs and your heart at once. It's also a quiet fitness test you can do anywhere.

slides.title: A gym hiding in plain sight
slides.body: Every flight asks your body to lift its own weight. Stairs are *strength and cardio* rolled into one.

slides.title: Legs and heart together
slides.body: Climbing works the big muscles that keep you mobile, while raising your heart rate. Both are linked to aging well.

slides.title: Notice your breath
slides.body: How you feel after a few flights is a gentle gauge of fitness. Less breathless over time *suggests progress*.

slides.title: Choose stairs when you can
slides.body: Skip the lift, take the steps, add one extra flight. Small daily choices *quietly add up*.

slides.title: Free, simple, repeatable
slides.body: Stairs cost nothing and ask little. Using them often *may support* a stronger, more capable future.

slides.title: Turn stairs into *steady gains*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your movement and steps and turns every flight you climb into one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The stairs are a free daily gym, and most of us walk right past them. 🌿

Climbing trains your legs and heart together, and your breath after a few flights is a quiet fitness test. Skip the lift when you can, and let it add up. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns every step you climb into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Taking the Stairs Is a Free Fitness Test
